"this movie was the first (popularly successful), breaking new ground for cinematic comedy, and is packed to the gills with quotable lines."

"Funny, clever, silly, largely entertaining due to the personalities of the presenters."
"over before I was ready. Definitely not a Hollywood formula product."

summary: The user has a strong preference for comedy, particularly works by the Zucker brothers and similar creators. They appreciate high production quality and engaging storytelling, favoring fast-paced narratives that are clever and entertaining.
